description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style axe with a single-piece construction, likely forged from metal. The handle is straight with a slight ergonomic curve and features three circular cutouts, possibly for weight reduction or grip enhancement. The blade is broad and wedge-shaped, with a textured, hammered finish on the upper surface, and a sharp, straight cutting edge. The poll (rear) of the axe is angular and pointed, suitable for prying or breaching tasks. The entire object has a matte black finish, giving it a sleek and utilitarian appearance. No visible branding or decorative markings are present.
description: A modern, matte black tactical axe with a textured wedge blade, straight handle with grip holes, and an angular poll.
description_view_0: The axe is shown from a side angle, highlighting the broad, textured blade, straight handle with three holes, and angular poll.
description_view_1: A top-down view showing the thin profile of the blade and handle, emphasizing the axe's narrowness and symmetry.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, again displaying the textured blade, handle cutouts, and the sharp, angular poll.
description_view_3: A bottom-up view, revealing the full length of the handle and the alignment of the blade and poll.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, ergonomic steel handle with three circular grip holes, matte finish, and a flat cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Broad, wedge-shaped blade with a straight cutting edge, textured upper surface, and angular poll; single-edged.
attribute_mounting_style: Single-piece forged construction; blade and handle are integrated.
